ASTROLUPINE-DULL_CRYSTAL_SMASH.descripti: #Deal !D! damage. For every 8 points in your Attack Register, deal damage 1 additional time.

ASTROLUPINE-MEMORY_LEAK.description: #Deal !D! damage. If Fatal, permanently increase this card's base damage by !Magic!.

ASTROLUPINE-VEST_ASSAULT.description: #Deal !D! damage. If this is the first card you play this turn, double its final damage.

ASTROLUPINE-MIMIC_RECKLESS_IMPACT.descri: #Deal damage equal to !D! times your Defense Register. Gain !Magic! Defense Overwrite.
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_IMPACT.title: Operator Impact
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_IMPACT.description: #Deal !D! damage. If you have played a Skill this turn, gain !B! Block.
ASTROLUPINE-GET_TOKEN.title: Get Token
ASTROLUPINE-GET_TOKEN.description: #Deal !D! damage. If the target has Trojan Horse Virus, gain 1 Energy.

ASTROLUPINE-RHOMBUS_SLICER.title: Rhombus Slicer
ASTROLUPINE-POWERED_ARMOR.title: Powered Armor
ASTROLUPINE-PARALLEL_PROCESSING.title: Parallel Processing
ASTROLUPINE-PARALLEL_PROCESSING.descript: #For this turn, the values of all Registers are doubled when [Read].
ASTROLUPINE-READ_ONLY_LOCK.title: Read Only Lock
ASTROLUPINE-READ_ONLY_LOCK.description: #Your Attack and Defense Registers cannot drop below !Magic!.
ASTROLUPINE-EXCEPTION_HANDLING.title: Exception Handling
ASTROLUPINE-EXCEPTION_HANDLING.descripti: #Whenever a Register's value changes, deal !Magic! damage to ALL enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-LONE_WOLF.title: Lone Wolf
ASTROLUPINE-BOTNET.title: Botnet
ASTROLUPINE-BOTNET.description: #At the start of your turn, gain Block equal to the total stacks of Trojan Horse Virus on all enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-LUPINE_INTUITION.title: Lupine Intuition
ASTROLUPINE-LUPINE_INTUITION.description: #Whenever an enemy is applied with Trojan Horse Virus or Zero Day Exploit, gain !Magic! Block.
ASTROLUPINE-EXPLOIT_ANOMALY.title: Exploit Anomaly
ASTROLUPINE-EXPLOIT_ANOMALY.description: #At the start of your turn, if you have any Register Overwrite, gain !Magic! Energy and draw !Magic! cards.
ASTROLUPINE-COOLING_ARCHITECTURE.title: Cooling Architecture
ASTROLUPINE-COOLING_ARCHITECTURE.descrip: #At the start of your turn, if your Attack Register is !Magic! or higher, draw 2 cards.
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_OVERLOADING.title: Operator Overloading
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_OVERLOADING.descrip: #Whenever you play a card with [Write], deal !Magic! damage to ALL enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-DAEMON.title: Daemon
ASTROLUPINE-FORMAT_STRIKE.title: Format Strike
ASTROLUPINE-FORMAT_STRIKE.description: #Deal !D! damage. Remove all Trojan Horse Virus from the target. For each stack removed, permanently increase the base damage of all Format Strikes this combat by !Magic!.
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT_ACCESS_ASSAULT.title: Root Access Assault
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT_ACCESS_ASSAULT.descript: #Deal !D! damage. If the target intends to attack, [Write] an equal amount to your Defense Register.
ASTROLUPINE-GARBAGE_COLLECTION.title: Garbage Collection
ASTROLUPINE-GARBAGE_COLLECTION.descripti: #Exhaust your discard pile. Deal !D! damage for each card exhausted.
ASTROLUPINE-ZERO_DAY_BLAST.title: Zero-Day Blast
ASTROLUPINE-ZERO_DAY_BLAST.description: #Deal !D! damage. Remove the target's Block and apply !Magic! Zero-Day Exploit.
ASTROLUPINE-DEADLOCK.title: Deadlock
ASTROLUPINE-DEADLOCK.description: #Deal !D! damage !Magic! times. Each hit deals additional damage equal to 2 times the target's Zero-Day Exploit.
ASTROLUPINE-SUDO_STRIKE.title: Sudo Strike
ASTROLUPINE-SUDO_STRIKE.description: #Deal !D! damage. Costs !Magic! less for each Attack Overwrite you have.
ASTROLUPINE-REDIRECT.title: Redirect
ASTROLUPINE-REDIRECT.description: #Gain !B! Block. Gain Kernel Hardening for the next two turns.
ASTROLUPINE-CRON_JOB.title: Cron Job
ASTROLUPINE-CRON_JOB.description: #Gain !Magic! Attack Overwrite, !Magic2! Defense Overwrite, and !Magic3! Draw Overwrite. Gain an extra turn.
ASTROLUPINE-LOW_LEVEL_REFACTORING.title: Low-Level Refactoring
ASTROLUPINE-LOW_LEVEL_REFACTORING.descri: #Gain !B! Block. Gain !Magic! Strength for each card Exhausted this combat.
ASTROLUPINE-SYSTEM_SNAPSHOT.title: System Snapshot
ASTROLUPINE-SYSTEM_SNAPSHOT.description: #Gain !B! Block. Record all your Registers' values. At the start of your next turn, restore all Registers to these values.
ASTROLUPINE-CONSOLE_AGENT.title: Console Agent
ASTROLUPINE-CONSOLE_AGENT.description: #Gain !B! Block. Choose one of your 3 most expensive Attack or Skill cards and play it !Magic! times.
ASTROLUPINE-SANDBOX_MODE.title: Sandbox Mode
ASTROLUPINE-SANDBOX_MODE.description: #Gain !B! Block. The next !Magic! cards you play this turn are played twice.
ASTROLUPINE-DYNAMIC_LINKING.title: Dynamic Linking
ASTROLUPINE-DYNAMIC_LINKING.description: #Draw !Magic! cards. Gain 1 Energy for each card with [Read] played this turn.
ASTROLUPINE-KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH.title: Knowledge Graph
ASTROLUPINE-KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH.description: #At the start of your turn, choose !Magic! cards from your draw pile and put them into your hand. They gain [Write] this turn.
ASTROLUPINE-SELF_CORRECTION.title: Self-Correction
ASTROLUPINE-DEEP_LEARNING.title: Deep Learning
ASTROLUPINE-DEEP_LEARNING.description: #Whenever you play a card with [Read] or [Write], deal !Magic! damage to a random enemy.
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT.title: Root
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT.description: #From now on, your [Read] effects will read the highest value among your three Registers.
ASTROLUPINE-HYPER_THREADING_FORM.title: Hyper-Threading Form
ASTROLUPINE-HYPER_THREADING_FORM.descrip: #The first time you play a [Write] card each turn, double the written value.
ASTROLUPINE-OPEN_SOURCE_PROTOCOL.title: Open Source Protocol
ASTROLUPINE-OPEN_SOURCE_PROTOCOL.descrip: #Whenever you gain any Overwrite (Attack/Defense/Draw), increment your Attack and Defense Registers by !Magic!.
ASTROLUPINE-TURING_COMPLETE.title: Turing Complete
ASTROLUPINE-TURING_COMPLETE.description: #Whenever you play a card with both [Read] and [Write], draw !Magic! cards.
